## Meeting Purpose

[Review content strategy and align on next steps for the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Analytics Shift:** Scrap the planned Looker dashboard; use PostHog directly, as it already provides the necessary BI and web analytics, simplifying the data stack.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [**Content Focus:** Deprioritize the "MCP" topic cluster, as it covers an auxiliary feature with minimal revenue impact. Reallocate its content to the "AI Agent Foundations" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [**Competitor Correction:** Replace "RunPod" with direct sandbox competitors like "CodeSandbox" or "Daytona" in comparison articles, as RunPod is a GPU cloud, not a direct competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**Technical Depth:** Add technical details to SEO-focused articles to attract advanced prospects, starting with the "What is a sandbox environment?" draft.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)

## Topics

### Analytics Strategy

  - [**Original Plan:** Use Google Analytics (GA) for web data → Build a Looker dashboard for reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Revised Plan:** Use PostHog directly.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [**Rationale:** PostHog is Blaxel's primary data warehouse and already provides both BI and web analytics, eliminating the need for a separate Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)

### Content Strategy & Topic Clusters

  - [**"MCP" Topic Cluster**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**Decision:** Deprioritize.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [**Rationale:** MCP hosting is an auxiliary feature with minimal revenue impact. The strategic focus is on the full agentic framework, not this single feature.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [**Action:** Reallocate relevant MCP content to the "AI Agent Foundations" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [**Topical Focus**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [**Primary:** "Code Execution & Sandboxes" and "AI Agent Foundations."](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1006.0)
      - [**Secondary:** "Comparisons & Mysticals" (e.g., alternatives articles) to capture competitor search traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**Keyword Research Process**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Method:** SEMrush analysis of competitor keywords and pages.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Goal:** Identify high-volume, low-difficulty keywords and fill content gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Refinement:** Manually include high-value topics (e.g., "Sandbox Lifecycle") even if their search volume is low, to establish Blaxel as an authority.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)

### Article Review & Production

  - [**"What is a sandbox environment?" Draft**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
      - [**Goal:** Balance SEO performance with Blaxel's opinionated brand voice.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
      - [**Action:** Add technical details to the draft to attract advanced prospects.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
      - [**Process:** Test a fast technical review from Blaxel to ensure accuracy without creating a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
  - [**Upcoming Articles (for next week's delivery)**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - ["How to build agentic AI applications"](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
      - ["What are dynamic AI agents?"](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
      - [**"RunPod alternatives" → "CodeSandbox alternatives" or "Daytona alternatives"**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**Featured Images**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
      - [**Action:** Create new images in the style of Blaxel's latest assets.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kathy:**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [Inform the engineering team to scrap the Looker dashboard and use PostHog directly.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [Update the Airtable content calendar to deprioritize the "MCP" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
      - [Change the "RunPod alternatives" topic to target a direct sandbox competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [**Nicolas:**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
      - [Provide feedback on the "What is a sandbox environment?" draft, adding technical details.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1933.0)
      - [Flag pure-play sandbox competitors in the shared document to help focus keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [**All:**](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [Review the Airtable content calendar and add comments.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
      - [Prepare for the next weekly sync on Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/AGyEdTZc-WeGRy_Ue11yjGpwbzYGXeb_?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
